title: Why will the September international break last three weeks?
summary: Starting in September 2026, football's international break schedule is undergoing significant changes that will extend that month's break to three weeks. The adjustment marks a major reorganization of the international calendar affecting the sport's fixture schedule.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explain the major changes happening to football's international breaks starting in September 2026

zh.title: 为什么九月的国际比赛日将持续三周?
zh.summary: 从2026年9月开始，足球的国际比赛日计划将经历重大变化，将该月的休赛期延长至三周。这一调整标志着影响体育赛程的国际赛历的重大重组。

title: Listen: Hearts flop in Europe, Maeda nears exit as Rangers rebuild continues
summary: Hearts suffered a European collapse in Graz while Rangers midfielder Daizen Maeda nears an exit from the Scottish club. The developments come amid Rangers' ongoing squad rebuild effort.
content: Hearts collapse in Graz, Maeda nears exit and Rangers keep rebuilding.

zh.title: 收听：哈茨在欧洲惨败，前田欲离，流浪者队继续重建
zh.summary: 哈茨队在格拉茨经历了欧洲赛事的崩盘，同时流浪者队中场球员前田大然即将离开这支苏格兰俱乐部。这些进展发生在流浪者队正在进行的球队重建过程中。

title: Newcastle closing in on Liverpool forward Kiernan
summary: Newcastle United are in advanced negotiations to sign Republic of Ireland forward Leanne Kiernan from Liverpool. The transfer would bolster Newcastle's attacking options.
content: Newcastle United are in advanced talks to sign Republic of Ireland forward Leanne Kiernan from Liverpool.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔即将签下利物浦前锋基南
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队正在与利物浦进行高级谈判，以签下来自爱尔兰共和国的前锋利恩·基南。这笔转会将增强纽卡斯尔的进攻选择。

title: 'Baur agrees terms for £4m sale to Celtic' - gossip
summary: Paderborn's Mika Baur is poised to join Celtic in a £4 million deal as the transfer window sees multiple moves: Daizen Maeda to Ipswich Town and Vanja Dragojević to Rangers. The flurry of activity signals significant squad rotation across several clubs.
content: Celtic are reportedly poised to Paderborn's Mika Baur while agreeing a transfer to Ipswich Town for Daizen Maeda as Vanja Dragojević's switch to Rangers appears to be unofficially confirmed.

zh.title: '鲍尔同意以400万英镑出售给凯尔特人' - 传言
zh.summary: 帕德博恩的米卡·鲍尔即将以400万英镑的交易加入凯尔特人，转会窗口见证了多笔交易：前田大贤至伊普斯维奇镇和万迪亚·德拉戈耶维奇至流浪者队。这股交易活跃期表明多家俱乐部进行了大规模阵容轮换。

title: Why Chelsea have signed so many Man City academy graduates
summary: Chelsea continue their strategy of recruiting Manchester City academy graduates, with Morgan Rogers being the latest addition to the squad. Rogers will join several other former City youth academy players already at the club.
content: Morgan Rogers is the latest ex-Man City academy player to join Chelsea and will be reunited with more former City team-mates.

zh.title: 切尔西为何签下这么多曼城学院毕业生
zh.summary: 切尔西继续执行招募曼城学院毕业生的战略，摩根·罗杰斯是最新加入球队的球员。罗杰斯将加入已在俱乐部效力的其他几名前曼城青年学院球员。

title: Football Daily
summary: A trivia segment testing readers' knowledge of football culture and personalities, exploring connections between legendary figures and popular culture.
content: Fergie, chocolate and Beckham... which one is true?

zh.title: 足球日报
zh.summary: 一个测试读者对足球文化和人物知识的琐事片段，探索传奇人物与流行文化之间的联系。

title: Who am I? Guess Premier League star No 2
summary: An interactive Premier League player identification challenge where readers guess which star is being described, testing their knowledge of current top-flight players.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜猜英超明星第2号
zh.summary: 一个互动式英超球员识别挑战，读者需要猜测所描述的是哪位明星球员，测试他们对当前顶级联赛球员的知识。
